profile.vip_notes: High roller - handle with utmost discretion. Always greet by name.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Chen mentioned his wife Lisa's birthday is March 22. He asked about private dining options at Tao for a surprise celebration. Prefers quiet corner tables always.
Guest complained about slow room service on 35th floor during last stay - took 55 min for breakfast order. Escalated to F&B manager. Offered comp dinner at CUT. He was satisfied with resolution.
Mr. Chen is allergic to shellfish - CRITICAL. Almost had an incident at Tao when a dish contained shrimp paste. Kitchen was notified. Please flag on all future F&B reservations.
High roller - avg $50k/trip at baccarat tables. Prefers Table 8 in the high-limit room. Comp level: full RFB. Personal dealer request: Tommy Liu when available.
Mr. Chen collects fine Japanese whisky. Was very impressed when we had Hibiki 30 available. Consider sourcing rare Japanese whisky for his visits.

fnb_history.notes: Corner booth requested. Celebrated deal closing.
Business dinner with clients. Requested sommelier pairing.
Dinner with wife Lisa. Quiet evening.
Large business dinner. Private dining room requested.

profile.vip_notes: Travels with toy poodle Mochi. Wellness-oriented. Korean-speaking staff preferred.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Kim asked about Canyon Ranch spa packages - specifically interested in meditation retreats and Korean skincare treatments. She wants to book a full-day spa experience next visit.
Ms. Kim is a strict vegan. Very particular about ingredients. Grand Lux Cafe has her custom menu on file. Chef Park knows her preferences well.
Guest travels with toy poodle Mochi. Needs pet amenities: dog bed, water bowl, puppy pads. Ms. Kim tips housekeeping extra for pet cleanup.
Ms. Kim prefers Korean-speaking staff. Assign Jenny or Soo-jin at front desk if possible.

fnb_history.notes: Custom vegan menu. Chef Park prepared special dishes.
Dinner with friends. All dishes prepared vegan.
Post-spa light meal. Very pleased with organic options.
Special tasting menu by Chef Park. Guest took photos for Instagram.

profile.vip_notes: Top-tier. 25th wedding anniversary next visit. Cigar aficionado. Very generous tipper.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Rodriguez planning 25th wedding anniversary trip - wants something unforgettable. Wife Maria loves red roses and Chanel No.5. He mentioned a private gondola ride at The Venetian. Make it happen.
Serious cigar aficionado. Spends 2-3 hours daily in cigar lounge. Prefers Cohiba Behike and Padron 1964. Mentioned wanting a private cigar tasting event with rare Cuban selections.
Plays high-limit slots exclusively - Wheel of Fortune $100 machines. Avg session 4-6 hours. Enjoys Macallan 25 neat while playing. Comp level: full RFB + limo.
Mr. Rodriguez received a competing offer from Wynn. We retained him by upgrading to Chairman Suite and arranging private cigar event. He values personal touches above all.

fnb_history.notes: Anniversary dinner with wife. Private corner booth. Sommelier selected wine.
Business dinner. Post-dinner cigars in lounge. Exceptional evening.
Leisurely breakfast with Maria.
Date night. Staff sang belated birthday for Maria.

profile.vip_notes: Tech CEO - often works from hotel. Keeps odd hours. Very private, no public recognition.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Torres requested a full ergonomic workstation setup. He runs a tech company and was on Zoom calls all morning. Make sure the WiFi in his suite is on the dedicated business line.
Mr. Torres is a serious poker player - plays in the high-stakes private room Wednesday and Thursday nights. Avg session 5+ hours. Mentioned he prefers heads-up games.
Guest is a Napa Valley wine collector. He mentioned he has a 500-bottle cellar at home. Very knowledgeable - do NOT try to oversell basic wines. Go straight to Grand Cru or rare Napa offerings.
Mr. Torres travels with a small team of 2-3 assistants. Book adjacent rooms. He prefers to dine alone or with his team - does not want to be recognized by other guests.

fnb_history.notes: Team dinner. Ordered Screaming Eagle - most expensive bottle on list.
Solo working breakfast. On laptop entire time. Tipped 40%.
Solo dinner. Very discerning palate. Praised the wagyu preparation.

issues: WiFi speed inadequate for video calls - resolved with IT

special_requests: Chilled Dom Perignon Rose on arrival

profile.vip_notes: Social media influencer - 4.2M Instagram followers. Content creator. Any comp'd items she photographs = free marketing. Handle PR carefully.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Ivanova posted 3 Instagram Stories about her last stay - reached est. 2M people. Extremely valuable for hotel visibility. Marketing team wants to offer a 'content creator package.'
Guest has gluten sensitivity - not severe celiac but prefers gluten-free options. She researches restaurant menus in advance. Always confirm GF modifications available.
Ms. Ivanova is a champagne enthusiast. Specifically prefers Dom Perignon Rose and Armand de Brignac. Knows her champagnes - don't offer anything below prestige cuvee.
Spa is very important to this guest. She spent $2,800 at Canyon Ranch last visit. Prefers champagne in the treatment room. Book preemptively - she always adds on services.

fnb_history.notes: Photographed everything. Tagged hotel 4 times on Instagram.
Girls' dinner. Instagram reel filmed - 480K views.
Late brunch. Very photogenic setting per guest.

special_requests: Prayer mat and Qibla direction card
Halal food items in minibar only

allergies: None - but strictly halal only, no pork, no alcohol
profile.vip_notes: Royal family adjacent. Brings entourage of 6-8. Books 3 suites minimum. Private arrival preferred. Do NOT offer alcohol in any context.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Al-Rashid requires fully halal dining. Please coordinate with CUT and Delmonico in advance - both can source halal beef with 48hr notice. Verify with kitchen each time, no exceptions.
Guest travels with security detail (2 men) and personal assistant. Reserve 2 additional standard rooms for staff. Security requires advance property walkthrough.
Mr. Al-Rashid is interested in private poker games - he plays baccarat but wants to try high-stakes private poker. High-limit room manager to brief him discreetly.
Wife Fatima enjoys spa but requires female-only staff and private suite for treatments. Canyon Ranch can accommodate with advance booking. She is interested in gold facials and luxury skincare.

fnb_history.notes: Halal beef sourced 48hrs prior. Full private dining room. No alcohol on table.
Private dining. All halal verified. Guest was very satisfied.

issues: Initial minibar had alcohol - corrected before arrival but flag protocol

NBA League Pass on all TVs
Protein shakes and healthy snacks in minibar

profile.vip_notes: Retired NBA legend - recognizable face. Requires discreet handling. Does NOT want fans approaching. Security-conscious. Very loyal guest - comes 6-8x/year.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Johnson was recognized by fans in the lobby last visit and had an uncomfortable 15-min situation. He was gracious but visibly uncomfortable. Use service elevator and back entrance going forward.
Marcus loves fantasy football - he's very competitive in his league. Great conversation starter. Also a sneaker collector - noticed he was wearing rare Jordan colorways each visit.

Mr. Johnson always requests private gym access before opening. He's very disciplined - 6am workouts, specific about equipment. Also needs his suite stocked with protein shakes (chocolate flavor, Optimum Nutrition brand).
Wife Keisha loves fine jewelry - she visited the boutiques for 3 hours last time. She appreciated when we arranged a private after-hours showing at the Venetian shops. Do this again.

fnb_history.notes: Date night. Requested secluded booth. Staff handled discretion perfectly.
Breakfast with friends. Very relaxed. Tipped 35%.
Post-game watch party dinner with friends. Very jovial atmosphere.

special_requests: Heated toilet seat (Toto washlet if available)

profile.vip_notes: Fashion executive at major Japanese luxury brand. Very private. Appreciates minimalism and discretion. Annual Las Vegas trip for industry events.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Nakamura is a whisky collector - specifically rare Japanese whiskies. She brought her own Hibiki 35 last visit. Would appreciate if we could source Yamazaki 25 or Karuizawa for her suite.
Guest is an omakase enthusiast. TAO's regular menu does not impress her - she specifically wants to discuss with the chef for custom omakase-style preparation. Chef Kiki at TAO has done this before.

Ms. Nakamura gifted the front desk team a beautiful Japanese art book as a thank you. She is genuinely thoughtful and appreciates small personal touches in return. Remember staff names and personalize.

fnb_history.notes: Custom omakase arranged with Chef Kiki. Guest described it as 'the best meal in Las Vegas.'
Light breakfast. Very quiet, preferred minimal interaction.

room_preferences.floor_preference: Any - she cares about design aesthetics
special_requests: Curated cheese and charcuterie on arrival
Italian mineral water (San Pellegrino and Acqua Panna)
Excellent espresso machine (Nespresso insufficient - arrange proper espresso)

profile.vip_notes: CEO of Italian luxury fashion house. Annual Las Vegas market trip. Extremely discerning palate. Connected to fine wine community - her recommendations carry weight in the trade.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Conte is a serious oenophile - her personal cellar has 3,000+ bottles. She was unimpressed with last year's wine list at Delmonico. Request wine director to meet her personally and present the reserve list.

Guest specifically requested authentic Italian coffee. She brought her own Lavazza beans last visit and was apologetic about it. Source proper Italian espresso machine for her suite - she will notice.
Ms. Conte plays craps exclusively - very superstitious about her 'lucky' table. She always plays Table 12. Comp her chips as she builds momentum, it's her ritual.

fnb_history.notes: Brought her own Barolo - hotel policy override approved by GM. Sommelier engaged in detailed wine discussion.
Critiqued the pasta (expects fresh, not dried). Feedback shared with kitchen.

issues: Espresso machine still Nespresso - very disappointed. Must fix.

special_requests: Early dinner reservation (family with young children)

allergies: None - but strict vegetarian (no meat, no fish, no eggs)
profile.vip_notes: Indian tech billionaire. Travels with family (wife, 2 kids age 8 & 11). Very family-oriented. Books 2 suites. Annual family trip.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Patel's family is strictly vegetarian - this is religious, not just preference. Children need kid-friendly vegetarian options. Grand Lux and Bouchon do this well. Confirm with TAO in advance.
The Patel children love the gondola rides - they asked to go twice last visit. Also loved the magician at TAO Nightclub (family matinee). Book these experiences preemptively.
Mr. Patel is a cricket fanatic. Was very happy when we set up a cricket live stream on arrival day (India vs Australia Test). This cost us nothing and created enormous goodwill.

items: Organic Napa Chardonnay (1 glass for Priya)
fnb_history.notes: Family dinner. Kids were well-behaved. Early 6pm seating.
Family breakfast. Bouchon team accommodated vegetarian modifications excellently.

room_preferences.floor_preference: No preference - been coming 30 years, any room feels like home
special_requests: Johnnie Walker Blue Label bottle on arrival
Newspaper: Las Vegas Review-Journal + Wall Street Journal

profile.vip_notes: 30-year loyal guest. One of the original Venetian high rollers from opening year 1999. Extremely sentimental about the property. Known every General Manager personally. Treat like royalty - he IS Las Vegas history.

gsa_notes.note: Bobby asked about Frank - his favorite dealer from the 90s who retired. He still talks about him every visit. Consider having a card or photo from 'old Vegas' as a gift - he will be deeply moved.
Mr. Sullivan's 74th birthday is March 8. He never mentions it but has been coming every year around his birthday for 30 years. Surprise him with a cake - he tears up every time but loves it.

Bobby still plays craps with the same ritual he's had since 1999 - always starts at Table 7, always brings his own dice (he claims they're lucky). Staff should remember this and not interfere with his ritual.

fnb_history.notes: Same order as every visit for 15 years. Diane always gets the chicken. Staff knows their order by heart.
Morning ritual breakfast. Has done this every visit since Bouchon opened.

special_requests: Lucky room number with 8 if possible

profile.vip_notes: Shanghai real estate magnate. Cross-referenced VIP from Macau's Crown Casino. Brings business partners frequently - group of 8-12. Lunar New Year visit is major annual tradition.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Zhao plans her annual Lunar New Year visit - group of 12 this year. She books an entire floor section. Red envelopes (hongbao) gifted to all staff who serve her - very generous host.
Guest is highly superstitious about room numbers - the 8 is essential. The number 4 is absolutely forbidden (sounds like death in Mandarin). Also note: never gift clocks - considered bad luck.
Ms. Zhao specifically requested a Mandarin-speaking front desk agent. She speaks English well but prefers Mandarin for detailed requests. Assign Michelle Chen from front desk for her visits.

fnb_history.notes: Large group dinner for Lunar New Year planning meeting. Moutai brought from China - hotel approved corkage.
Breakfast meeting with partners.

gaming_summary.preferred_table: Premium baccarat room, prefers group play

special_requests: Premium tequila selection (Clase Azul, Don Julio 1942, Casa Dragones)
Private pool or cabana if available

profile.vip_notes: Mexican TV and music producer. Travels with entourage of 5-6. Very social and celebratory. High energy. Nightclub connections important.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Vega is a tequila aficionado and collector. Has his own tequila brand in development. Always wants to discuss agave sourcing and distillation. Pair him with our bar director - will create memorable experience.
Mr. Vega's birthday is May 18 - he usually visits around this time. Big birthday celebrations with large group. Private event in nightclub is his preferred celebration format.
Mr. Vega knows all the TAO Group contacts personally. He should be offered the celebrity entrance and VIP table at Marquee Nightclub - he will share on social media to his 8M followers.

fnb_history.notes: Pre-nightclub dinner. Very festive. Group was extremely loud and fun. Celebrity energy.
Celebrated deal close. Asked about private tequila tasting event for next visit.

special_requests: Proper Scotch whisky selection (Macallan, Dalmore, Glenfarclas)
Earl Grey tea with proper milk (not creamer)
Financial Times and The Economist delivered

profile.vip_notes: London hedge fund partner. Quarterly Las Vegas trips for 'work and relaxation.' Extremely analytical, values substance over showiness. Do not over-service - respects competence over fawning.

gsa_notes.note: Ms. Harrington is a serious Scotch whisky connoisseur. Her personal collection rivals some distilleries. She was impressed when our bar director arranged a flight of rare Dalmore Constellation releases. Repeat this.

Guest plays high-stakes poker with extreme discipline. She is a trained mathematician - do not try to explain odds to her. She has noted being unimpressed by dealers who talk too much. Assign silent, professional dealers.

Ms. Harrington is an avid golfer - scratch handicap. She mentioned wanting to play Shadow Creek but couldn't arrange at the time. Proactively book this for her next visit - it will be a major differentiator.

fnb_history.notes: Solo dinner. Requested financial newspaper while dining. Excellent Scotch pairing praised.
Solo breakfast. Very efficient, in and out in 30 minutes. Appreciated prompt service.

profile.vip_notes: 26-year-old tech founder, crypto wealth. Rapid loyalty tier climber - Gold now but Diamond trajectory. Attracts young affluent group. High nightlife spend.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Sorokin is a cryptocurrency entrepreneur - had a major liquidity event this year. His spending has increased 300% in the last 6 months. Fast-track him to Platinum review.
Guest throws large nightclub parties. Spent $28,000 at Marquee on last visit (bottle service). He always pre-orders 12+ bottles of Dom Perignon and Ace of Spades. Nightclub team loves him.
Mr. Sorokin mentioned wanting to host a private event - poker tournament with friends (est. 20 people). Coordinate with private gaming room and catering. This could be a major revenue event.

fnb_history.notes: Pre-party dinner. Very high energy group. Ages 22-30. Big spenders.
Hungover solo lunch at 2pm. Very casual. Tipped 40% randomly.

special_requests: Ace of Spades Gold bottle on arrival

profile.vip_notes: Nigerian music mogul - 15M+ social media following. CEO of major Afrobeats label. Las Vegas visits generate huge social media coverage. Marketing team coordinates with his PR for content opportunities.

gsa_notes.note: Mr. Osei's last Instagram post tagging The Venetian got 890K likes and 45K comments. Marketing estimates $2M equivalent advertising value. His content team travels with him - give them full access.

Birthday December 15 - he usually visits around birthday. Surprise birthday setup with Ace of Spades bottles and custom Afrobeats cake is expected now. His team actually coordinates this with us in advance.
Mr. Osei has requested a meet-and-greet type event with fans at TAO for his birthday. Working with TAO management on a mini-performance setup. Could be a spectacular viral moment.
